title: 7 distinctions for Indwe Secondary matriculant
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"KWANONQABA NEWS -  After five years of academic excellence, Indwe Secondary School’s Musa Mbolelwa walked away from his matric year with seven distinctions under his belt.","html":"KWANONQABA NEWS - After five years of academic excellence, Indwe Secondary School’s Musa Mbolelwa walked away from his matric year with seven distinctions under his belt."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Mbolelwa’s peers erupted into thunderous applause when it was announced that he was the top matric learner for 2025 when they received their National Senior Certificate results today, 13 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mbolelwa was already a top-performing learner at Indwe Secondary. When asked if he was shocked by the number of distinctions he achieved, he simply replied: “No.”","html":"Mbolelwa was already a top-performing learner at Indwe Secondary. When asked if he was shocked by the number of distinctions he achieved, he simply replied: “No.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Among his seven distinctions, Musa scored 98% for physical sciences and 95% for mathematics.","html":"Among his seven distinctions, Musa scored 98% for physical sciences and 95% for mathematics."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His mother, Noxolo Yantolo, told Mossel Bay Advertiser she is unbelievably proud of her son.","html":"His mother, Noxolo Yantolo, told Mossel Bay Advertiser she is unbelievably proud of her son."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mbolelwa will be pursuing a qualification in mechatronics engineering, a combination of the principles of mechanics, electronics and computing, at the University of Cape Town this year.","html":"Mbolelwa will be pursuing a qualification in mechatronics engineering, a combination of the principles of mechanics, electronics and computing, at the University of Cape Town this year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Indwe Secondary achieved a pass rate of 85.7%. “We are so proud of you,” said the school’s principal, Ntsikelelo Ngcenge.","html":"Indwe Secondary achieved a pass rate of 85.7%. “We are so proud of you,” said the school’s principal, Ntsikelelo Ngcenge."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“You have pushed yourselves and your hard work has paid off.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Two other Indwe Secondary learners also told the Advertiser of their plans for the future. Friends Lupho Tyesi and Sivuyile","html":"Two other Indwe Secondary learners also told the Advertiser of their plans for the future. Friends Lupho Tyesi and Sivuyile"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Maliwa will both be pursuing higher education, one at Nelson Mandela University and the other at Stellenbosch University.“It’s been a long 12 years. I can’t wait to leave,” said Tyesi.","html":"Maliwa will both be pursuing higher education, one at Nelson Mandela University and the other at Stellenbosch University.
“It’s been a long 12 years. I can’t wait to leave,” said Tyesi."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
